response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, DLang libraries), and clear leadership in open-source and workshop initiatives, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership via open-source projects and workshops
Broad technical stack across languages, platforms, and systems including mobile (iOS/Apple TV)
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership beyond technical mentorship
Lacks documented experience leading organizational change or strategic roadmap planning
Mobile experience is incidental (iOS app maintenance), not focused on mobile platform ecosystems or tooling
